results.title: SOP celebrates Gawai with first-ever bowling-themed Family Day
results.description: MIRI: Sarawak Oil Palms (SOP) marked this year’s Gawai celebration with a fresh twist, bringing together employees for its first bowling themed ‘Kasi Jadi Gawai’ Family Day at Megalanes East, Bintang Megamall. results.title: Suniel Shetty Defends Ranveer Singh Amid Don 3 Row: Who Are You To Ban? | EXCLUSIVE
results.description: Suniel Shetty has come out in support of Ranveer Singh amid the Don 3 controversy, saying no one has the right to ban an actor or art. He urged Farhan Akhtar and Ranveer to resolve the issue through face to face conversation.

results.title: Westlake U-Haul Yard Erupts in Smoky Truck Inferno by MacArthur Park
results.description: A fire at a Westlake U‐Haul facility destroyed multiple trucks Friday afternoon; firefighters knocked down the blaze and no injuries were reported.

results.title: Award-winning author David Alexander Robertson receives honorary doctorate from Queen’s University
results.description: David Alexander Robertson detailed his inspiration behind his storytelling ahead of receiving an honorary Doctor of Laws from Queen’s University on Wednesday. Robertson, a two-time Governor General Award winner, has written over 35 books throughout his career. Robertson grew up in Winnipeg, Man. and is a member of Norway House Cree Nation.
